sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 74:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 74:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot of direct light clothed in the ten Sefirot of reflected light that emerge through a coupling by striking for the first time are called one Sefira. It is named after the highest Sefira in that level, although it contains ten Sefirot lengthwise and ten Sefirot thick-wise. (Part 3, Inner Observation, Chapter 4, item 3)
